title: androsace yargongensis var. stenophylla
intro: Androsace yargongensis var. stenophylla, also known as Tibetan rock jasmine, is a variety of the Androsace yargongensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the primrose family, Primulaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Androsace yargongensis var. stenophylla include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
